'''Yang Earth Dragon''' is the 5th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 戊 Tsuchinoe (yang earth, the gaia-aligned face of autumn), and its branch is 辰 Tatsu, the [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the earth element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Fire Rabbit]] (node 4) and [[Yin Earth Snake]] (node 6).

== Folk reading ==
Folk tradition treats Yang Earth Dragon as the '''year of upheaval''', when entrenched orders crack and the old guard is cast down. Civil wars and changes of rulership are remembered as Tsuchinoe-tatsu years in the chronicles, even where their actual dates do not align.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] — yang earth
* '''Branch:''' [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon (辰)]] — yang earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' autumn

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Fire Rabbit]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Earth Snake]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q118701}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
